overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a cloaked character walking through a foggy, snow-covered mountain pass at night. The character traverses a narrow rocky canyon that opens into a wider ruin-dotted landscape before entering a dense, misty forest. The scene features dramatic lighting from scattered lanterns against a dark blue winter sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain canyon passage with rocky walls

agents.ego_description: character in dark ornate cloak walking steadily along the snow-covered path between high rock walls

entered.detail: tall dark rock wall forming the left boundary of the canyon
tall rocky cliff face on the right side of the path
tall black iron post with warm glowing lantern providing path illumination
snow-dusted ground with visible wagon wheel tracks running along the path

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow, enclosed mountain canyon at night. The camera follows a cloaked character walking between towering rock walls on either side. Warm light from an iron lantern post cuts through the foggy darkness ahead, illuminating the snow-covered ground with distinct wagon tracks.

scene_state.functional_zone: open mountain path with ancient stone ruins

events.description: exits narrow canyon as rock walls recede, revealing open mountain landscape with scattered trees

agents.ego_description: continuing along the winding path as the environment opens up, passing stone structures on the left

entered.detail: low ancient stone wall or building ruins partially covered in snow
leafless trees dotting the hillside on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The canyon opens into a wider mountain landscape. Ancient stone ruins appear on the left while the right cliff face gives way to scattered trees and open sky. The character continues along the snow path, passing the weathered stone wall as the lantern posts continue to mark the route ahead.

events.description: entering denser fog and forest area with reduced visibility

agents.ego_description: walking deeper into the misty forest following the path marked by distant lanterns

entered.detail: tall leafless trees forming a dense forest boundary on the left
tall leafless trees forming a dense forest boundary on the right
thick atmospheric fog reducing visibility and creating a hazy blue-gray ambiance

segments.scene_description: The path leads into a densely forested area shrouded in thick fog. The stone ruins disappear behind as tall leafless trees close in on both sides. The warm glow of distant lanterns provides the only light in the misty darkness as the character continues along the snow-covered trail.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a restrictive mountain canyon that gradually opens into a ruined landscape before closing in again within a misty forest. It begins by following a cloaked character between towering rock walls, where the warm glow of an iron lantern illuminates snow-covered ground and deep wagon tracks. As the canyon walls recede, the scene expands into a wider mountain vista featuring ancient stone ruins on the left and scattered trees under an open night sky. The path then shifts away from the weathered ruins and leads the character into a dense thicket of leafless trees. Finally, the environment becomes shrouded in thick fog, with the distant light of lanterns providing the only visibility through the oppressive, misty darkness.
